rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (semantic constraints), shows where the draft drifts from it (the conclusion contradicts the thesis), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the PCFG ranking being the dominant contributor and the type filter doing little work.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (the conclusion under-credits semantics).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
